Advances in Real-Time Rendering in Games

Tuesday, 21 July 2026 9:00am - 12:15pm PDT

Course description

An overview of the annual course and its organizers.

Syllabus

Speeding up Path Tracing via ORCA
Jon Greenberg (EA SEED)

Smolder - Real-Time Volumetric Effect Rendering
Alexander Mueller (IO Interactive)

Talks

SPEEDING UP PATH TRACING VIA ORCA

Abstract: This talk presents an online radiance cache that accelerates real-time path tracing without temporal history.

PDF PPTX

SMOLDER - REAL-TIME VOLUMETRIC EFFECT RENDERING

Abstract: A scalable volumetric rendering framework integrated with lighting, transparent surfaces, and fog in a production game engine.
